violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to use dishwasher for WASH ONLY. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized at the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Truffle aioli and pesto (homemade) was observed with a datemark exceeding 7 days. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of item at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the sanitizer buckets/3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The condensate from the walk-in freezer unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Per PIC, a work order has been placed to repair the walk-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
The ceiling in the front sandwich prep/cashier area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

At the time of inspection, the facility kitchen was observed to be equipped with a 2 bay sink next to the dish machine. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. Sink compartments shall be large enough to accommodate immersion of the largest EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2023
